items.summary: Remove the business address / location card from the Contact section so the Contact grid no longer displays any location/address field, while keeping the email and legal (GSTIN, registration status) cards intact and preserving the responsive grid layout.
Remove the "Our Location" content block from the About section so the About section no longer includes the address text or any heading referring to location.

Remove location/address details from the site footer so the footer no longer displays the street address block and no longer shows any "Location:" field in the Legal Information area, while keeping the email links and GSTIN visible.
